name: tcloud
description: TCloud — a self-hosted file manager that uses a Telegram bot + private channel as an unlimited storage backend. Multi-user accounts with custom roles, per-user permission overrides and quotas; a private per-user TDrop inbox fed by the bot; advanced public sharing (custom slugs, passwords, expiry, limits, drop-boxes); a first-run setup wizard; full theming; JSON-based i18n; an installable PWA; encrypted backups with channel-snapshot recovery; and a plugin API.
